overall.description: First-person exploration through a dark industrial facility in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player moves from narrow corridors through foggy warehouse spaces to a workshop area with distinctive yellow and cyan neon lighting, showcasing detailed industrial machinery and atmospheric environmental design.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial maintenance corridor with metal railings

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through narrow corridor with metal handrails and industrial machinery

entered.detail: metallic safety railing running along the left wall
large concrete support pillar with metal fixtures
wall-mounted industrial control box with yellow accents
smooth concrete corridor wall with greenish lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow industrial corridor with teal-green artificial lighting. Metal handrails line the left side while large concrete pillars and industrial control panels occupy the center and left mid-ground. The camera moves steadily forward through the enclosed maintenance passage.

events.description: ambient light drops significantly entering dark corridor section with minimal illumination

agents.ego_description: proceeding through dimly lit passage toward distant light source at tunnel exit

entered.detail: shadowed concrete wall surface in low light conditions
faint yellow light visible at the end of the dark corridor

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a darker tunnel section with significantly reduced lighting. The walls are barely visible while a distant yellow light marks the exit ahead. The industrial pillar from the previous area recedes into the left background as the camera advances through the shadowy passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse with atmospheric fog and yellow lighting

events.description: exits narrow passage into large open industrial hall with yellow atmospheric lighting and fog
yellow industrial lights become prominent through atmospheric fog and haze

agents.ego_description: approaching industrial stairs and platform in large warehouse space with atmospheric fog

atmospheric fog illuminated by yellow industrial lighting
safety railing along the left side of the walkway
red carpet or matting on the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark tunnel, the space opens into a large industrial warehouse filled with yellow atmospheric fog. Metal stairs and platforms are visible ahead through the haze, while red floor markings appear in the foreground. The lighting shifts dramatically to warm yellow tones as the camera approaches the staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: workshop area with illuminated workbench and tool storage

events.description: enters workshop area approaching workbench with scattered tools and equipment

agents.ego_description: approaching and examining the workbench area with tools and industrial equipment

bright yellow overhead light illuminating the work area
yellow rolling tool cabinet with drawers
wall with hanging tools and equipment storage

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a workshop area dominated by a central workbench bathed in yellow light. Tools are scattered across the bench surface while a yellow tool cabinet stands to the right. The atmospheric fog clears as the player explores the detailed work area with pegboard storage visible on the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: tool storage wall with cyan neon lighting

events.description: lighting shifts to bright cyan neon as approaching organized tool wall

agents.ego_description: examining the tool wall with organized equipment under cyan neon lighting

entered.detail: large pegboard wall with organized hand tools and wrenches
bright cyan neon tube light above the tool board
stacked cardboard boxes on the floor near the workbench

segments.scene_description: The lighting shifts dramatically to bright cyan neon as the camera focuses on a well-organized tool pegboard. The neon strip casts a cool glow over the arranged tools while cardboard boxes sit on the floor nearby. The workbench moves to the left as the player examines the tool storage area.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial machinery bay with heavy equipment

events.description: moves away from neon light into darker industrial area with red machinery

agents.ego_description: moving past industrial machinery and red equipment in dimly lit bay

entered.detail: large red industrial machinery or vehicle with visible text markings
heavy industrial equipment and metal structures
scattered debris and materials on the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: Leaving the neon-lit tool area, the scene returns to darkness as the camera moves through an industrial bay. A large red vehicle or machinery piece dominates the right side while debris litters the floor. The lighting drops to low levels with only minimal ambient illumination highlighting the heavy industrial equipment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark industrial facility that transitions from narrow, dim corridors into a brightly lit workshop before receding back into shadowy machinery bays. It begins in a narrow maintenance passage with teal-green lighting and concrete pillars, moving steadily forward until the environment plunges into a dark tunnel where only a distant yellow light is visible. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the space opens into a vast warehouse filled with yellow atmospheric fog and red floor markings, eventually leading into a detailed workshop centered around a brightly lit workbench and tool cabinets. The lighting then shifts dramatically to a cool cyan neon glow as the camera focuses on an organized tool pegboard, before finally turning away from the light to enter a dim industrial bay dominated by a large red piece of machinery and scattered debris.
